title: Drifting Nissan Silvia S15 Coloring Page
seoTitle: Medium Drifting Nissan Silvia S15 Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this medium drifting Nissan Silvia S15 coloring sheet. High-resolution free printable PDF showing a Japanese sports coupe drifting around a mountain curve.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Nissan Silvia S15 is a legendary JDM sports coupe, highly sought after for drifting due to its rear-wheel-drive layout.
It is powered by the famous SR20DET turbocharged 4-cylinder engine, producing 250 horsepower from the factory.
Its lightweight chassis and balanced 50:50 weight distribution make it a drift racing icon.
